events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete. The insufficient anchor bolt projection is a **fail** — it prevents full nut thread engagement per API RP 686 guidance, undermining bolt preload and baseplate leveling capability. Since the work is only rough-complete (not yet grouted/torqued), it's a correctable nonconformance but must be dispositioned and fixed (bolt reset/replacement or extension) before proceeding to grout and final torque. Findings, corrective actions, and rationale are written to `/app/answer.json`.
